defects.description: Administratum analyzer and bundle workflows wrote runtime outputs into tracked CURRENT_STATE analyzer files, dirtying worktree on ordinary runs.
defects.impact: Clean handoff impossible after routine analyzer checks.
repair_summary: Added runtime receipts with post-build hash/size/filename/source metadata
Added explicit checkpoint command for intentional commit-ready snapshots
remaining_risks: Legacy scripts outside patched set might still reference CURRENT_STATE analyzer paths and should be audited in larger structure task.
Legacy tracked analyzer files remain as historical snapshots and can still be edited manually if operator bypasses policy.

notes: Focused repair registry. Broader registry spine intentionally deferred to the larger structure task.
